_comment: Node 7 weight pins (locked decision #10). Every weight referenced in workflow.json / workflow_lineart_fallback.json MUST appear here so runpod_setup.sh can curl + sha256-verify before ComfyUI boots. A None/empty sha256 is a TODO marker — operator fills in after the first known-good download on the pod. ComfyUI-Manager is the convenience path for local workflow authoring; the pod uses this file as the source of truth.

models.name: anyloraCheckpoint_bakedvaeBlessedFp16
models.role: SD 1.5 line-art checkpoint (base model for Node 7 txt2img)

models.name: bnw_lineart_v1
models.url: TODO: replace with a stable BnW / monochrome LoRA URL (civitai or huggingface)
models.role: Black-and-white / monochrome LoRA stacked on top of AnyLoRA to bias output toward clean BnW line art.

models.name: control_v11p_sd15_openpose
models.role: OpenPose/DWPose ControlNet for the dwpose workflow (human characters).

models.name: control_v11p_sd15_lineart
models.role: LineArt ControlNet for the lineart-fallback workflow (non-human characters).

models.name: control_v11p_sd15_scribble
models.role: Scribble ControlNet for the lineart-fallback workflow (paired with LineArt at 0.6 each).

models.name: ip-adapter-plus_sd15
models.role: IP-Adapter Plus SD1.5 - feeds the reference color crop to bias identity.

models.name: clip-vision-vit-h
models.role: CLIP Vision encoder required by IP-Adapter Plus SD1.5.

customNodes.name: comfyui_controlnet_aux
customNodes.role: Provides DWPreprocessor, LineArtPreprocessor, ScribblePreprocessor used by both Node 7 workflows.

customNodes.name: ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus
customNodes.role: Provides IPAdapterUnifiedLoader + IPAdapter nodes used by both Node 7 workflows.
